name: Mario Kart
description: Nintendo's kart racing subseries starring Mario characters, built around items, accessible multiplayer, and competitive track design.

eras.title: 2D / Mode 7 Era
eras.description: The original SNES entry establishes kart racing with items, Mario characters, and split-screen multiplayer.

eras.title: 3D Multiplayer Era
eras.description: The series expands through 3D tracks, four-player local racing, handheld entries, and online play.

eras.title: Modern Deluxe Era
eras.description: Mario Kart becomes a long-tail platform series through Mario Kart 8, Deluxe, large-scale DLC, and Switch-era continuity.
